command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 5VLbyFp4XQz9R3Z.38e798e5c3b1 --database hiMSRR6jLFgWQvJW7KXFLZ --execute 
UPDATE subscription_plans 
SET features = JSON_SET(features, '$.voiceNarration', true) 
WHERE tier IN ('pro', 'enterprise', 'consumer_premium');

UPDATE subscription_plans 
SET features = JSON_SET(features, '$.voiceNarration', false) 
WHERE tier IN ('starter', 'consumer_free');
